RepresentativeInfo.CapitolAddress: MO House of Representatives, 201 West Capitol Avenue, Room 115-G, Jefferson City MO 65101
RepresentativeInfo.Biography:
Representative Steve Jordan, a Republican, proudly represents Stoddard County, the southern half of Bollinger County, and the southwest quarter of Cape Girardeau County (District 151) in the Missouri House of Representatives. He was elected to his first two-year term in November 2024.
Rep. Jordan previously served his community for over 34 years as the vice president and general manager of Heavy Duty Trux LTD.
In addition to his legislative duties, he is an active member of the Cape County Cowboy Church. Rep. Jordan also enjoys spending quality time with his wife, Danielle, and together they are the proud parents of four children: Amanda, Miranda, Stephania, and Samantha.

SponsoredBill.LongTitle: Grants the air conservation commission the authority to create standards and guidelines
Specifies that a food is deemed adulterated if it contains any cultivated meat
Modifies the low-income housing tax credit, allowing priority allocation for certain projects in federally declared natural disaster areas
